73909.subject: NEAR Protocol Monthly Update | The Privacy Renaissance Runs on NEAR
73909.body:
NEAR Protocol Monthly Update

Автор: NEAR Protocol


Автор: NEAR Protocol

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/near-protocol-monthly-update-privacy-renaissance-rrhwe?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BbR7u4fnLSO%2BzdnPDb0NZjw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1DIm9DkrOeMYg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpvki3um~i7-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpvki3um-i7
  
Featured News ✦ Arthur Hayes and Illia Polosukhin on the Privacy Renaissance Maelstrom's Arthur Hayes and NEAR Co-founder Illia Polosukhin joined The Rollup to make the case that privacy is becoming the defining requirement for onchain markets. Public chains expose every order's size, direction, and timing, which keeps serious capital off-chain. Confidential Intents finally brings exchange-grade confidentiality to cross-chain DeFi. WATCH ON THE ROLLUP ✦ $VVV Is Live on NEAR Intents and near.com $VVV, the token of privacy-first AI platform Venice, is now live on NEAR Intents and near.com, swappable across 35+ chains and 135+ assets. The listing pairs with NEAR AI providing private inference to Venice, connecting confidential AI and confidential cross-chain execution across one stack. SWAP $VVV ON NEAR.COM ✦ Universal Send: Confidential Payments Are Live on near.com Confidential payments are live on near.com with Universal Send. Pay anyone in any asset, on any chain, without exposing your wallet activity. Open near.com, scan a QR code, and pay with what you hold. The recipient receives the asset they want. One confirmation, confidential by default. TRY UNIVERSAL SEND ✦ The Government of Bermuda and NEAR AI Partner to Deploy AI-Powered Public Services The Government of Bermuda and NEAR AI announced a partnership to deploy secure AI across public services, launching with an assistant that lets public servants process sensitive citizen data on NEAR AI Cloud's private inference infrastructure. Queries run inside hardware-enforced enclaves where the host OS, GPU operator, and NEAR AI itself are cryptographically locked out. READ THE ANNOUNCEMENT Around the Ecosystem NEAR Intents surpassed $19B in all-time cross-chain volume, across 35+ chains and 135+ assets. near.com has processed $209M+ in confidential volume over the past 30 days. USDC is now live in the NEAR AI Agent Market, with confidential execution through Confidential Intents to power private stablecoin settlement for agentic payments. IronClaw v0.28 "IronClaw Reborn" is live, with a rebuilt runtime, isolated tool calls, outbound approval, WeChat support, and thinking for Ollama. NEAR AI shipped automatic PII anonymization, a context-aware classifier that strips names, emails, credentials, and API keys before a prompt reaches frontier models. NEAR AI and FailSafe released Attac

73908.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Strategy sells bitcoin
73908.body:
Coinbase launches Indian rupee rails with perps access in expansion push | 'Gnosis will cover all user losses' amid exploit related to Gnosis Pay, co-founder Koppelmann says | Binance adds over 7,000 US stocks and ETFs for traders outside the United States amid super app push | Dev helps rescue $2 million locked in 2016 ICO contract for nine years with whitehat exploit |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Kyle Baird

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Monday! *Bitcoin* dropped below $72,000 as ETF outflows mounted for a third straight week and whale buying stalled. Analysts say ( https://www.theblock.co/post/403179/bitcoin-weakens-near-72k-as-etf-outflows-stalled-whale-buying-and-macro-uncertainty-weigh-on-prices-analysts?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) weakening demand and macro uncertainty are weighing on sentiment, with this week's U.S. economic data now in focus.

In today's newsletter, *Michael Saylor's Strategy* sells 32 BTC for $2.5 million, *Coinbase* continues its India push, *Gnosis* co-founder *Martin Koppelmann* confirms an exploit related to *Gnosis Pay* , and more.

Meanwhile, *Strategy's bitcoin* sale timing throws a wrench ( https://www.theblock.co/post/403213/strategy-bitcoin-sale-timing-throws-wrench-20-million-polymarket-pool?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) into a $20 million *Polymarket* pool resolution.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*👀 Michael Saylor's Strategy sells 32 BTC for $2.5 million*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/403160/michael-saylors-strategy-sells-bitcoin?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Strategy* sold 32 BTC for $2.5 million, marking its first *bitcoin* sale since a 704 BTC tax-loss trade in December 2022.

* The company said proceeds from the bitcoin sales are expected to be used to fund distributions on preferred stock.
* Strategy still holds 843,706 BTC worth roughly $60 billion, representing more than 4% of bitcoin's fixed 21 million supply.
* Strategy sold 801,994 MSTR shares for approximately $128.3 million last week, per the filing, with approximately $26.1 billion left available under the at-the-market program.
* However, this includes shares sold but not yet settled as of May 31, and no M

73906.subject: The Daily Degen - June 1st, 2026
73906.sender: The Daily Degen from The Daily Degen <thedailydegen@substack.com>
73906.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-1st-2026

Happy Monday and Happy June friends!
Let’s get after it!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles)
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.527T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $743.27
Gold: $4,483.30
Silver: $74.92
Oil (WTI): $91.50
US 10Y Treasury: 4.471%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 31
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
“Vaults” continues to be a huge buzzword as of late, and for good reason!
Many believe that “vaults” are the primary manner in which defi will be brought to the masses, and that it is also one of the most appropriate terms with which we can communicate the value defi provides!
In this vein, there is no project out there more intentionally and devotedly building upon this concept than @rocksolidHQ [ https://substack.com/redirect/4c98b60d-b787-4ffb-a41d-297125acfada?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
RockSolid is an extremely cool new project built by co-founders Ben Ward @wardy_ben [ https://substack.com/redirect/59049468-649f-41df-b274-46d1963fa7b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and Steve Pack @paladin_eth [ https://substack.com/redirect/7ae551eb-736e-47cc-ac1a-4e699745932a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]… who started RockSolid to bring the best yield-maxxing opportunities possible to the world of defi!
They now have two such vaults: a) the Rocksolid $rETH Vault [ https://substack.com/redirect/89c71ed4-915e-4cd6-92e4-73509319ba57?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and b) the RockSolid AutoPlus Looped $ETH Vault [ https://substack.com/redirect/4bc549b9-4915-4e74-a6b7-21de4430051b?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]!
In addition, if you want a great breakdown of everything RockSolid is doing, check out the interview RockSolid co-founder Steve Pack did with Sam Kamani for the Rocket Fuel podcast (embedded below!)…
Also make sure to follow RockSolid on Twitter/X [ https://substack.com/redirect/4c98b60d-b787-4ffb-a41d-297125acfada?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates as well, and stay tuned as we continue bringing updates on everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mixed today. Top-performing top 50 chain on the monthly is Mezo (#47) at +172%. 
Protocols are also mixed today. Top-performing top 50 protocol on the monthly is Kinetiq (#38) at +55.59%. 
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Chains By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $100M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Protocols By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $100M TVL (from @Def

73902.subject: Britain has crushed immigration, and harmed itself
73902.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTR9AAcAAAAAAiagrJxKCwgdRPsjkcDdVDFJJweAtxuruw3xw0_lAxfiqqutZ0YKsOXuz4IQlT5n2Jxob6AmGNcpd6GAzBdBDN9B09wHlkbaU_AQRax-VwC_ 

June 1st 2026

 

 
 
 

 The Economist Today
 


 Our best journalism, handpicked each day
 


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTR9AAcAAAAAAiagrJxLDUtaM06y4lSSTA20nVl22SB4JmniF1Cp6LdQTUzX4eSk69Cm9_v9y1MXeJode1qtpHvFtFBq921rm-H7Qk7LkokDuT0G-S_86XxC 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTR9AAcAAAAAAiagrJxMkUcthllZYlZ8n9mASa5HtJl_8yTbArGbwN_99nMfc5oUOf3XyeqyfcjNRwE30OJpFqYwlpEF372IFVf7ZFOfAxRVFZrl5VSWkcak 



 
 

Lane Greene

Senior digital editor



 Britain has stemmed the tide of immigration that landed on its shores after Brexit. 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4OTR9AAcAAAAAAiagrJxNRmWRyPI9YFiFQQqYPVD3Gp9eWYQ1PN037SFrInc01UuNXvx4bISa_8LFszowCIAXVh1XHukOAQ-P1Z1puegCRoXAMKL4ctI 
To its cost .
 Immigrants often make more than locals; employers want them; they pay extra taxes to fund the health service. Now that it’s far harder for workers to come, a greater share of immigrants will be asylum seekers—exactly the people xenophobes say they don’t want. 


 And Standard Chartered’s boss recently caused a fuss by describing replacing “lower-value human capital” with investment in AI. His sin was not callousness, but a tin

73901.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest - June 1
73901.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-1-oleh-bezuhlyi-el3bf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BayQe90SnTxiQPBIzyoRcFQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2jp6Lnr9rHMIg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpveop9b~ip-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpveop9b-ip
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Market sentiment remains cautious but structurally bullish as Bitcoin caps its best May performance since 2019. Despite regulatory headwinds from a White House veto, institutional momentum continues to accelerate via Ethereum ETF fee wars and stablecoin milestones. 🏛️Biden Vetoes Bipartisan Resolution to Overturn SEC’s SAB 121 President Joe Biden vetoed a measure that sought to repeal the SEC’s controversial Staff Accounting Bulletin 121, which mandates firms list customer crypto holdings as liabilities. Biden argued the "guardrails" are necessary for consumer protection, sparking criticism from industry leaders who claim it stifles bank-led crypto custody. Read full story 📉Uniswap Foundation Postpones High-Stakes Governance Vote The Uniswap Foundation delayed a critical vote on the "UNI fee switch" proposal, which would reward token holders for staking. The postponement followed concerns raised by an unnamed stakeholder, causing the UNI token to plunge over 8% as the community debates the influence of venture capital on decentralized governance. See details 🏛️ARK Invest Withdraws from Spot Ethereum ETF Partnership In a surprise move, Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest has pulled out of its joint bid for a spot Ethereum ETF with 21Shares. While ARK remains committed to its Bitcoin ETF, the filing was rebranded to the "21Shares Core Ethereum ETF," signaling a shift in strategy just as the industry enters the final S-1 approval phase. Read full story 📈Bitcoin Records Best May Performance Since 2019 Bitcoin closed the month of May with an approximate 11% gain, marking its strongest May performance in five years. The monthly rally was fueled by renewed spot ETF inflows and shifting macroeconomic sentiment, positioning the asset for a potential retest of its all-time high in June. See market analysis 💰Franklin Templeton Reveals Ultra-Low 0.19% Fee for Ethereum ETF Franklin Templeton has set a competitive tone for the upcoming spot Ethereum ETF market by disclosing a management fee of just 0.19%. This matches its aggressive pricing for the Bitcoin ETF (EZBC), intensifying the "fee war" among major issuers like BlackRock and Fidelity as they prepare for official trading. Read full story 🪙Ethena’s USDe Stablecoin Hits $3 Billion Supply Milestone Ethena Labs' synthetic dollar, USDe, reached a $3 billion supply just four
